args.query: SELECT repo_name, COUNT(*) AS commit_count FROM commits GROUP BY repo_name;

exec_args.sql: SELECT repo_name, COUNT(*) AS commit_count FROM commits GROUP BY repo_name;

args.query: SELECT repo_name, language_description FROM languages WHERE repo_name IN ('facebook/react','tensorflow/tensorflow','Microsoft/vscode','apple/swift','twbs/bootstrap','torvalds/linux');

exec_args.sql: SELECT repo_name, language_description FROM languages WHERE repo_name IN ('facebook/react','tensorflow/tensorflow','Microsoft/vscode','apple/swift','twbs/bootstrap','torvalds/linux');
